UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the application.

uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

numericId.description: A randomly generated 8-digit numeric ID for the user.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

holdBalance.description: The user's balance that is on hold and cannot be used.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

paymentMethods.description: A list of the user's linked payment methods.

name.description: The name of the payment method (e.g., PhonePe, Paytm).

upiId.description: The user's UPI ID for that payment method.

inviterUid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who invited this user.

claimedUserRewards.description: An array of task IDs for new user rewards that have been claimed.

AdminPaymentMethod.title: Admin Payment Method
AdminPaymentMethod.description: Stores payment method details configured by the admin.

accountHolderName.description: The name of the account holder for bank transfer.

ifscCode.description: The IFSC code of the bank.

upiHolderName.description: The name of the UPI account holder.

usdtWalletAddress.description: The TRC20 wallet address for USDT.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a user's request to buy LGB.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the order.

orderId.description: A unique, randomly generated ID for the order, prefixed with 'LGPAY'.

amount.description: The amount of LGB to buy, in INR.

paymentType.description: The payment method type chosen by the user.

paymentProvider.description: The specific UPI provider chosen (e.g., PhonePe).

adminPaymentMethodId.description: The ID of the admin payment method used for the transaction.

sellerId.description: The UID of the seller in a P2P transaction.

sellerUpiDetails.description: The UPI details of the seller in a P2P transaction.

status.description: The current status of the order.

cancellationReason.description: The reason provided by the user for cancelling the order.

rejectionReason.description: The reason provided by the admin for rejecting a payment.

utr.description: The UTR (for bank/UPI) or Transaction Hash (for crypto) of the payment.

screenshotURL.description: URL of the uploaded payment screenshot.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the user submitted payment proof.

verificationResult.description: Result from the AI payment verification flow.

SellOrder.title: Sell Order
SellOrder.description: Represents a user's request to sell LGB and withdraw money.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the sell order.

userNumericId.description: The numeric ID of the user who created the order.

userPhoneNumber.description: The phone number of the user who created the order.

orderId.description: A unique, randomly generated ID for the order, prefixed with 'LGPAY'.

amount.description: The amount of LGB to sell, in INR.

remainingAmount.description: The amount of the sell order that is still available to be bought.

withdrawalMethod.description: The UPI method chosen by the user for withdrawal.

name.description: The name of the UPI provider (e.g., PhonePe).

status.description: The current status of the sell order.

matchedBuyOrders.description: A list of buy orders that have been matched with this sell order.

utr.description: The UTR/reference number of the payment sent by the admin.

failureReason.description: Reason for a failed or cancelled sell order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the sell order was completed by the admin.

ChatRequest.title: Chat Request
ChatRequest.description: Represents a user's request to chat with a human agent.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who requested the chat, if they are logged in.

userNumericId.description: The numeric ID of the user, if they are logged in.

enteredIdentifier.description: The phone number or UID the user entered to start the chat.

status.description: The current status of the chat request.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the chat request was created.

chatHistory.description: The full conversation history with the AI before escalating.

userName.description: The name of the sender (e.g., user's display name or agent's name).

attachment.description: An optional attachment with the message.

agentId.description: The ID of the admin/agent who joined the chat.

agentJoinedAt.description: Timestamp when an agent joined the chat.

RewardTransaction.title: Reward Transaction
RewardTransaction.description: A record of a reward granted to a user, e.g., from daily tasks.

userId.description: The ID of the user who received the reward.

amount.description: The amount of the reward in LGB.

description.description: A description of why the reward was given (e.g., 'Daily Task: Complete 5 orders').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the reward was claimed.

orderId.description: A unique ID for the reward transaction.

DailyReward.title: Daily Reward
DailyReward.description: Tracks rewards claimed by a user on a specific day. The document ID should be in YYYY-MM-DD format.

claimedTaskIds.description: A list of task IDs that have been claimed for the day.

date.description: The date for which the rewards were claimed.

Report.title: Problem Report
Report.description: Represents a user-submitted problem report regarding an order.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who submitted the report.

userNumericId.description: The numeric ID of the user.

orderId.description: The ID of the order being reported (Firestore document ID).

message.description: The user's description of the problem.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the report was created.

status.description: The current status of the report.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public profile information for each user.

/paymentMethods/{methodId}.description: Stores admin-configured payment methods (Bank or UPI) for users to make payments to.

/users/{userId}/orders/{orderId}.description: Stores user orders to buy LGB.

/users/{userId}/sellOrders/{orderId}.description: Stores user orders to sell LGB.

/users/{userId}/transactions/{transactio.description: Stores miscellaneous user transactions, such as claimed rewards.

/chatRequests/{requestId}.description: Stores user requests to chat with a human agent.

/users/{userId}/dailyRewards/{date}.description: Stores daily claimed rewards for a user. {date} is YYYY-MM-DD.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Stores user-submitted problem reports for orders.
